title: OpenTargets GraphQL — associated diseases as a SQL-native POST
description: OpenTargets Platform GraphQL is an HTTP POST with a JSON query body. The manifest materializes the response with ducknng_ncurl_table, then the declared operation unnests the typed GraphQL envelope into ordinary rows. No OpenTargets client code and no GraphQL-specific core resolver.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (here, a GraphQL POST via ducknng_ncurl_table).

resources.title: OpenTargets associated diseases for one target

params.sql: SELECT * FROM ducknng_ncurl_table('https://api.platform.opentargets.org/api/v4/graphql', 'POST', '[{"name":"Content-Type","value":"application/json"},{"name":"Accept","value":"application/json"}]', json_object('query', 'query AssociatedDiseases($ensemblId: String!, $pageSize: Int!) { target(ensemblId: $ensemblId) { id approvedSymbol associatedDiseases(page: { index: 0, size: $pageSize }) { count rows { score disease { id name } } } } }', 'variables', json_object('ensemblId', getvariable('ensembl_id'), 'pageSize', coalesce(try_cast(getvariable('page_size') AS INTEGER), 3)))::VARCHAR::BLOB, 30000, coalesce(getvariable('tls'), 0)::UBIGINT)

operations.title: OpenTargets associated diseases for one target
operations.description: Return associated disease rows for an Ensembl target id from the OpenTargets GraphQL response.

ensembl_id.description: Ensembl target id, for example ENSG00000157764 for BRAF.

sql.sqlTemplate: WITH target AS (SELECT data.target AS target FROM opentargets_target_associated_diseases), rows AS (SELECT target.id AS target_id, target.approvedSymbol AS approved_symbol, target.associatedDiseases.count AS total_count, UNNEST(target.associatedDiseases.rows) AS row FROM target) SELECT target_id, approved_symbol, CAST(total_count AS BIGINT) AS total_count, row.disease.id AS disease_id, row.disease.name AS disease_name, row.score AS score FROM rows ORDER BY score DESC
